_comment: Front backplane (PERC RAID + PERC-flashed sas2ircu), addressed as enc:slot. Dell 12G on LSI IT mode reports a clean mirror-reversal across 8 bays -> reverse_slots. For an arbitrary permutation instead, drop reverse_slots and use 'map': {"32:0": "32:7", ...}. Calibrate with: b2ctl locate <serial>

Back PCIe SSD enclosure(s) (NVMe). Relabel each drive to a custom bay by 'by-id' (substring of /dev/disk/by-id/nvme-<model>_<serial>), 'serial' (the SERIAL column in `b2ctl status` — easiest), or PCIe 'bdf'. Precedence: by-id > serial > bdf. e.g. map: [ {"by-id": "nvme-Samsung_SSD_990_EVO_Plus_4TB_S7..", "bay": "PCIe2:0"}, {"serial": "S7XXNS0W123", "bay": "PCIe2:1"}, {"bdf": "d8:00.0", "bay": "PCIe2:2"} ]. A drive's bdf: cat /sys/class/nvme/nvme0/address . One or more back panels are allowed.
